positive: A highly detailed, mystical celestial forest scene featuring intertwining crescent moons, stylized nocturnal flora (like phosphorescent ferns and glowing mushrooms), and geometric astral constellations. The style should be a sophisticated, modern bohemian illustrative print, executed with precise, deep black linework and negative space. Composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, maximizing a strong, clear silhouette for print transfer. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep teal, matte gold, and creamy ivory. The artwork should resemble a complex, elegant tattoo flash sheet or a premium book illustration, suitable for direct apparel printing, emphasizing high contrast and bold outlines.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, copyright, logo, trademark, messy, dirty, jpeg artifacts, noise, grain, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, photorealism, sketch, oil painting
